pred_reason: The contract exhibits reentrancy vulnerabilities in the mint function and has arithmetic overflow issues, aligning with SWC-101 and SWC-107. Multiple findings confirm unsafe external calls and unchecked math operations. Evidence: Finding 1 confirms reentrancy risk in mint function with high severity; Finding 7 identifies critical arithmetic overflow in mint operations; Finding 5 recommends ReentrancyGuard due to significant reentrancy exposure
